# NOMOS

> NOMOS is a neuro-operational recalibration practice for executives. Three doors — CRISIS (NOMOS protocol), LEVEL UP (ASCENSION protocol), and AEGIS (Exocortex APP) — route each leader to the right diagnostic, protocol, or living steering system.

NOMOS combines identity work, operator recalibration, and a decision cortex for founders and executives whose bandwidth caps before their business does. Case studies document clinical transformations under the NOMOS protocol.

## Pages

- [Home — Three doors](/): Landing hub — pick CRISIS, LEVEL UP, or AEGIS.
- [NOMOS — CRISIS Protocol](/nomos): 90-day APEX™ protocol, Neuro-Operational Drift™, 5 executives per quarter.
- [ASCENSION — LEVEL UP Protocol](/ascension): 6-month identity elevation for leaders in expansion phase.
- [AEGIS — Exocortex APP](/aegis): Auxiliary cortex with People Board, Decision Log, Pulse Learning Cards, and 10-year trajectory.
- [Metaphysical Dimension](/metaphysique): Invisible Alignment™ and strategic avant-gardism.
- [Case studies index](/case-studies): Documented neuro-identity transformations.

## Case studies

- [Restoration of Sovereignty — Leader C.](/case-studies/c): Identity dissonance, glass filter, operational untouchability.
- [Flagship Vessel Recalibration — Operator L.](/case-studies/l): Neuro-Operational Drift™, ANS regulation, Ultra-Elite pivot.
- [40% to 85% occupancy — Leader H.](/case-studies/h): Place cognitive identity, emanation peak, Indonesia.
